summary: Added optional ### Autopilot section to config-reader.md with all 7 keys (bug_query, feature_query, max_issues_per_run, max_features_per_run, stop_on_error, dry_run, lock_file) with correct defaults and a reference to skills/autopilot/SKILL.md. Extended Notifications on_events enum to include pipeline-started, step-completed, and pipeline-completed alongside existing pr-created and ceos-agents-block.
